# models/

## ⚠️ Generated files

`component-definitions.json`, `component-models.json`, and `component-filters.json`  
at the project root are **generated files**. Do not edit them directly.

They are excluded from git (see `.gitignore`) and regenerated by:

```bash
npm run build:models
```

## Source of truth

Each block owns its Universal Editor schema in `blocks/<name>/_<name>.json`:

| Block           | File                                                                                             |
| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| accordion       | [blocks/accordion/\_accordion.json](../blocks/accordion/_accordion.json)                         |
| enrollment-flow | [blocks/enrollment-flow/\_enrollment-flow.json](../blocks/enrollment-flow/_enrollment-flow.json) |
| hero            | [blocks/hero/\_hero.json](../blocks/hero/_hero.json)                                             |
| my-account      | [blocks/my-account/\_my-account.json](../blocks/my-account/_my-account.json)                     |
| plans           | [blocks/plans/\_plans.json](../blocks/plans/_plans.json)                                         |
| promo-banner    | [blocks/promo-banner/\_promo-banner.json](../blocks/promo-banner/_promo-banner.json)             |

## shared.json

`models/shared.json` contains page-level items that don't belong to any single
block folder:

- `section` model — page section style selector
- `main` filter — defines which blocks are allowed in the main content area

## Adding a new block

1. Create `blocks/<name>/_<name>.json` with `definitions`, `models`, `filters`, `eds`, `mock` keys.
2. Run `npm run build:models` to regenerate the root JSON files.
3. The pre-commit hook runs this automatically before each commit.
